subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down from Our presence unto all who dwell upon the earth: Worship none but Him, for verily He sufficeth you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من علی الارض اجمعین الا تعبدوا الا ایاه انه یکفیکم و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of prayer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
